_comment: Claude Desktop configuration for JP Bids MCP + freee MCP integration.
_comment_freee: freee MCP Remote: OAuth authentication happens automatically on first connection.
_comment_jpbids: JP Bids MCP is hosted remotely. mcp-remote bridges Streamable HTTP to stdio.

jp-bids._comment: Remote JP Bids MCP. During beta (until June 2026) no API key required.

freee._comment: Remote freee MCP. OAuth login is triggered on first use.
